title: Polite negotiation
subtitle: Ask for a change without pressure.

sections.title: Pattern
rows: It would work better for me...

items.es: ¿Sería posible cambiar la cita al jueves?
items.en: Would it be possible to change the appointment to Thursday?
I understand that there is a lot of demand.

items.es: Como alternativa, podría venir el viernes por la mañana.
items.en: As an alternative, I could come on Friday morning.

items.es: Me vendría mejor una hora más tarde.
items.en: An hour later would work better for me.
Thank you for looking for a solution.
